issues: Fee description says 'Northwest Forest Pass (about $5/day or annual)' - missing specific annual price of $30
Should clarify the exact pricing structure for visitor clarity

2026_corrected.fees: Northwest Forest Pass required: $5/day or $30/annual to park at Heliotrope Ridge

outdated_pricing.description: Some routes list 'about $5/day or annual' without specifying the $30 annual rate
outdated_pricing.impact: Users may be uncertain about total pass cost for multi-day trips

missing_specific_limits.description: Enchantment Lakes group size (8 person max) should be emphasized in route descriptions
missing_specific_limits.impact: Parties larger than 8 may be turned away at lottery application

ten_dollar_per_person_structure.note: This fee structure does not appear in official Wenatchee RD, Enchantments, or Alpine Lakes USFS fee schedules for 2026. This may have been historical pricing or a misrecording.

enchantments_overnight.notes: Day-use permits are FREE and self-issued

immediate_fixes: Update Mt. Baker fee text from 'about $5/day or annual' to '$5/day or $30/annual'
For any Enchantment Lakes routes, clearly state: '$5/person/day + $6 non-refundable lottery application fee' with group size limit of 8
verification_checklist: Confirm all USFS routes specify $30 annual pass price (not just 'annual')
Remove any references to $10/person fees (not a current USFS rate)
Add lottery dates for Enchantments (Feb 15 - Mar 1 for current year)
Clarify day-use vs overnight permit differences
research_gaps: If $10/person fees appear in database routes, these should be verified against historical WTA archives or recreation.gov history
Some camp-specific fees (like certain campgrounds in the range) may have individual rates - verify site-by-site for accuracy

data_quality_notes.source_priority: Official USFS and Recreation.gov websites are authoritative; WTA provides summaries for WA-specific context
data_quality_notes.update_frequency: Fee schedules can change annually - recommend reviewing each January for spring updates
